sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: YXT Forecast — Price Prediction for 2026. Should I Buy YXT?
feed.summary: This article provides a stock price prediction for YXT.Com Group Holding Ltd (YXT) for 2026 and beyond, based on technical signals, moving average trends, short sell data, chart pattern matching, and seasonality analysis. Despite overall negative signals leading to a "Strong Sell" recommendation, the analysis also presents monthly price forecasts for 2026 with potential returns and identifies May as historically the best month for positive returns. The article details both bullish and bearish technical indicators and provides a 2030 forecast.

feed.title: Iconic restaurant chain closes its last locations after 30 years
feed.summary: Bahama Breeze, an iconic restaurant chain known for its Caribbean-inspired theme, has closed all its remaining 28 locations after 30 years, with the last day of operation being April 5th. Darden Restaurants Inc., the parent company, stated that the brand was no longer a "strategic priority." While 14 locations are permanently closed, the other 14 will be converted into different Darden-owned restaurant brands.

feed.title: Corning Inc stock: AI boom drives 50% YTD rally – buy now?
feed.summary: Corning Inc. has seen a significant 50.2% year-to-date rally in 2026, driven by strong demand from AI data centers and major deals with Meta and Apple. The materials company, known for Gorilla Glass and optical fiber, is considered a "pick-and-shovel" play in the AI, 5G, and EV megatrends, offering diversified tech exposure. While recent trading has shown some volatility, analysts remain largely bullish on Corning's earnings potential and long-term growth driven by AI infrastructure buildout.

feed.title: zSpace (ZSPC) CFO adds 136,000 RSUs and boosts common share holdings
feed.summary: zSpace, Inc. CFO Erick DeOliveira received a new grant of 136,000 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) and exercised existing RSUs that converted into 21,083 shares of common stock. These transactions are equity-based compensation, aligning the CFO's interests with the company's performance, as no open-market buying or selling was involved. Following these activities, DeOliveira directly holds 61,583 common shares and 236,667 RSUs, with the new RSUs vesting quarterly over one year starting July 1, 2026, contingent on continued service.

feed.title: Top Waste Management Stocks Worth Watching - April 6th
feed.summary: MarketBeat has identified seven waste management stocks worth watching, including Waste Management (WM), GFL Environmental (GFL), and Custom Truck One Source (CTOS), based on their recent dollar trading volume. The article highlights that the waste management sector offers stable, contract-driven revenue and dividend potential but is also subject to regulatory influences, commodity prices, and high infrastructure costs. Investors are advised that top-rated analysts suggest other buys, despite Waste Management having a Moderate Buy rating.

feed.title: Altimmune (ALT) director makes open-market share purchase
feed.summary: Altimmune, Inc. director John Gill purchased 9,200 shares of common stock on the open market at a weighted average price of $3.4076 per share, totaling approximately $31,350. This transaction increases his direct holdings to 21,700 shares. The purchase, made in multiple trades between $3.4050 and $3.4080, signals a positive sentiment from an insider.

feed.title: Utility serving 3.6 million customers sets May 1 earnings webcast
feed.summary: Dominion Energy (NYSE: D) has scheduled its first-quarter 2026 earnings call for May 1, 2026, at 11 a.m. ET. The company will host a live webcast and telephonic conference call to discuss financial results and other matters. Dominion Energy provides regulated electricity and natural gas services to millions of customers across Virginia, North Carolina, and South Carolina.

feed.title: News | In conversation: A flex office executive on solving workplace challenges
feed.summary: Anna Squires Levine, formerly president of Industrious and now in a new role at CBRE, discusses the evolution and future of the flexible workplace segment. She highlights how Industrious segments its market by the problems different user types—individuals, medium, and large teams—are trying to solve, and how location strategies cater to these diverse needs. Levine also touches on the growth of the flex office market, its appeal to landlords, and its potential to enhance both Class A and Class B buildings.

feed.title: MSCI maps out all four 2026 earnings calls, with first on April 21
feed.summary: MSCI Inc. (NYSE: MSCI) has announced the dates for its quarterly earnings releases and conference calls for 2026, with the first quarter call scheduled for April 21, 2026. Subsequent calls are set for July 21, 2026, October 20, 2026, and January 26, 2027. Investors and participants can register in advance for the first quarter call and access related materials and webcasts on MSCI’s Investor Relations website.

feed.title: Tata Communications maintains a Leader Position for 13th Straight Year in Gartner® Magic Quadrant
feed.summary: Tata Communications has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Global WAN Services for the thirteenth consecutive year. The company has enhanced its network fabric with AI and analytics, expanded its network-on-demand portfolio, invested in high-capacity wavelength services, and strengthened its SASE capabilities. Tata Communications plans to offer quantum-safe encryption services to further secure enterprise environments.

feed.title: General Mills to close pizza crust plant in St. Charles, eliminate 163 jobs
feed.summary: General Mills announced it will close its pizza crust plant in St. Charles, Missouri, by June 2026, resulting in 163 job losses. The Minneapolis-based company cited the need for cost savings and a more competitive supply chain as reasons for the closure. General Mills acquired the plant from TNT Crust in 2022 and is also planning to close two pet food plants in Joplin.

feed.title: Private Credit's Next Cycle Will Be Defined By Recovery Rates: KKR Report
feed.summary: A KKR report suggests that recovery rates, not default rates, will be the defining factor of the next private credit cycle. The report, led by Kris Novell, emphasizes that broader definitions of default, including PIK interest and amend-and-extend transactions, indicate early financial stress. KKR anticipates recovery rates could drop significantly below historical averages, with effective portfolio management and quality origination being key for success in this challenging environment.

feed.title: RBC (RBMCF) $1,000 Auto‑Callable Notes Linked to ConocoPhillips, April 2027
feed.summary: Royal Bank of Canada has offered contingent income auto-callable senior notes linked to ConocoPhillips common stock, with a stated principal amount of $1,000 and an aggregate principal amount of $389,000. These notes offer contingent quarterly payments of $25.50 (10.20% per annum) but carry principal at risk, as investors could lose their entire investment if the final underlier value falls below the downside threshold. The securities may be automatically redeemed early if the underlier meets a specific redemption threshold, and their initial estimated value is lower than the public offering price.

feed.title: Delta Air Line Stock Enjoys Pre-Earnings Pop as Oil Cools
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines Inc (DAL) stock is showing a slight uptick ahead of its fiscal first-quarter earnings report. Despite a recent quarterly loss and being down 12% from its February record high, the stock still boasts an 80.8% year-over-year lead. Options traders are currently pricing in a 9.4% move post-earnings and are largely betting on downside for the shares.

feed.title: General Mills to eliminate 163 jobs as it shutters Missouri manufacturing plant
feed.summary: General Mills will eliminate 163 jobs as it closes a manufacturing plant in Missouri, a move aimed at achieving $100 million in savings. A state filing indicates that the pizza crust plant is scheduled to shut down in June. This decision follows prior announcements regarding General Mills' financial performance, including a recent cut in profit and the revival of a taco brand.

feed.title: These Nevada grocery stores are cheaper than Walmart
feed.summary: A recent Consumer Reports analysis found that several grocery stores in Nevada are cheaper than Walmart, which was used as a baseline for comparison. Costco, WinCo, and Aldi were among the cheapest supermarkets nationally, with Costco being 21.4% cheaper. In contrast, Whole Foods was identified as the most expensive, costing nearly 40% more than Walmart.

feed.title: EDGAR Filing Documents for 0001999371-26-007705
feed.summary: This EDGAR filing details the Form N-CSRS (Certified Shareholder Report, Semi-Annual) for WealthTrust DBS Long Term Growth ETF (WLTG). The filing includes various documents such as the shareholder report, Section 302 and 906 certifications, and interactive data files. It provides company information for ETF Opportunities Trust, including its address, CIK, and state of incorporation.

feed.title: Camden Property Trust (CPT) CFO Fraker reports 22,988-share stake
feed.summary: Camden Property Trust's EVP, CFO, and Treasurer, Benjamin D. Fraker, has filed an initial Form 3 reporting direct ownership of 22,988 Common Shares. This filing establishes his equity position as an officer of the company. The Form 3 is an initial statement of beneficial ownership and does not indicate any buy or sell transactions.

feed.title: Tesla vs. Ford: What analysts are saying after disappointing Q1 deliveries
feed.summary: This article discusses analyst reactions to disappointing Q1 deliveries for both Tesla and Ford. It likely compares how the market perceives the future outlook and stock performance of these two major automakers following their recent performance.

feed.title: A Look At Synchrony Financial (SYF) Valuation After New Figo Pet Insurance Partnership
feed.summary: Synchrony Financial (SYF) has partnered with Figo Pet Insurance, linking Figo policies with CareCredit cards for veterinary payments. Despite recent stock volatility, including a 22.66% decline over 90 days and a 3.65% 7-day return, the stock shows long-term momentum with a 55.47% one-year total shareholder return. Valuation models suggest SYF is undervalued, with an intrinsic value of $145 per share compared to its current trading price of US$68.42, although market sentiment and short-term earnings expectations keep consensus targets lower.

feed.title: Why Atlas Energy Solutions (AESI) Shares Are Trading Lower Today
feed.summary: Atlas Energy Solutions (AESI) shares dropped today after the company announced a plan to offer $300 million in Convertible Senior Notes and released preliminary Q1 2026 financial results anticipating a net loss. Investors are concerned about potential share dilution from the convertible notes. The company intends to use part of the funds from the debt offering to repay existing debt.

feed.title: Boost Run merger vote slips three weeks as Willow Lane awaits SEC filing
feed.summary: Willow Lane Acquisition Corp. (WLAC) has rescheduled its extraordinary general meeting to approve the business combination with Boost Run to April 30, 2026, from the original April 8, 2026 date. This delay is to await the SEC declaring effective the Registration Statement on Form S-4. The record date for shareholders remains March 12, 2026, and the redemption deadline for Class A ordinary shares is adjusted to April 28, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. ET.

feed.title: Chantilly apartment complex sells for $258.5M to Morgan Stanley affiliate
feed.summary: An affiliate of Morgan Stanley has acquired The Preserve at Westfields, an apartment complex in Chantilly, for $258.5 million. The property features 595 units housed in two mid-rise multifamily buildings, along with two small retail sites. The transaction was reported by the Washington Business Journal.

feed.title: Coca-Cola replaces Pepsi as beverage provider for hotel chain Marriott International
feed.summary: The Coca-Cola Company has secured an agreement with Marriott International to become the hotel chain's global beverage provider, replacing long-standing rival Pepsi. This deal will see Coke products offered across Marriott's approximately 9,700 properties in 143 countries, marking a significant win in the ongoing beverage rivalry. Coca-Cola emphasizes that this partnership reflects the strength of its brands and guest preference for its beverage portfolio, aiming to enhance the guest experience.

feed.title: Coca-Cola replaces Pepsi as beverage provider for hotel chain Marriott International
feed.summary: Coca-Cola has secured a significant deal with Marriott International, replacing Pepsi as the hotel chain's exclusive beverage provider worldwide. This agreement places Coke products in approximately 9,700 Marriott properties across 143 countries, marking a major victory in the ongoing rivalry between the two soft drink giants. Coca-Cola emphasized that the partnership reflects the strength of their brands and guest preference, aiming to enhance the overall guest experience through consistency and a broad beverage portfolio.

feed.title: Illinois American Water Launches Pilot Program to Connect Eligible Customers with Water and Wastewater Bill Discounts – Company Announcement - FT.com
feed.summary: Illinois American Water is launching a pilot program in partnership with Promise to help eligible customers access water and wastewater bill discounts. The program uses text message outreach to identify customers who may qualify for monthly discounts ranging from 10-80 percent and streamlines the application process through Dollar Energy Fund. This initiative aims to increase awareness and simplify enrollment for existing assistance programs.

feed.title: Some Illinois water customers could cut bills by more than half
feed.summary: Illinois American Water has launched a pilot program to help eligible customers receive water and wastewater bill discounts of 10%-80%. The program uses text message outreach via a partner called Promise for quick eligibility screening and streamlined enrollment into the Income-Based Discount Program, administered by Dollar Energy Fund. This initiative aims to increase awareness of existing assistance programs and simplify the application process for those who qualify.

feed.title: Why a Wall Street Analyst Warns Tesla Shares Could Drop 60%
feed.summary: JPMorgan analysts are warning investors that Tesla's stock could drop by as much as 60% due to a disconnect between its rising share price and declining business fundamentals. Despite a significant stock rally, the company faces weakening sales, shrinking profits, and record-high inventory levels, with first-quarter earnings estimates sharply revised downwards. While CEO Elon Musk aims to refocus investors on future initiatives like robotaxis and humanoid robots, the company's current stock performance is deemed out of sync with its financial outlook.

feed.title: [144] Zai Lab Ltd SEC Filing
feed.summary: A Form 144 SEC filing for Zai Lab Ltd (ZLAB) indicates proposed and recent sales of American Depositary Shares by an affiliate. The filing details restricted stock vesting on April 2, 2026, and several dispositions by Ying Du in March-April 2026, including multiple 50,000-share sales. The filing has a neutral impact and sentiment according to Rhea-AI.

feed.title: Under-the-skin Tepezza comparable to infused version in key study, Amgen says
feed.summary: Amgen has announced that an injectable, on-body injector version of its thyroid eye disease drug, Tepezza, demonstrated comparable efficacy to the infused version in a Phase 3 trial. This subcutaneous option, named Tepezza OBI, could help Amgen maintain market leadership against emerging rivals and potentially expand market access by offering a more convenient treatment. The company expects to disclose full study results at an upcoming medical meeting, with analysts noting the critical role of competitive convenience and safety profiles for market positioning.

feed.title: [144] Zai Lab Ltd SEC Filing
feed.summary: Zai Lab Ltd (ZLAB) filed a Form 144 revealing proposed or recent sales of American Depositary Shares (ADS) by Frazor T. Edmondson, totaling three transactions in March and April 2026 for a combined value of over $406,000. The filing also noted restricted stock vesting as compensation on April 2, 2026. This Form 144 serves as a notice of intended sale rather than a confirmation of execution.

feed.title: Aldeyra Therapeutics Faces Class Action Lawsuit Over Drug Trial Issues
feed.summary: Aldeyra Therapeutics is facing a class action lawsuit filed on behalf of investors who purchased securities between November 3, 2023, and March 16, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Aldeyra failed to disclose inconsistent results from clinical trials of its drug candidate reproxalap, leading to the FDA rejecting its application and a significant drop in stock price. The lead plaintiff deadline is May 29, 2026.

feed.title: ZLAB (NASDAQ: ZLAB) Form 144 shows Rafael Amado sold ADS in Mar–Apr 2026
feed.summary: A recently filed Form 144 indicates that Rafael Amado sold American Depositary Shares (ADS) of Zai Lab Ltd (NASDAQ: ZLAB) across multiple transactions in March and April 2026. The sales included 10,000 ADS for $173,800 on March 3, 2026, 2,957 ADS for $55,083.59 on March 13, 2026, and 9,910 ADS for $202,065.89 on April 2, 2026. These transactions, filed on April 6, 2026, were processed through Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC and involved restricted stock vesting.

feed.title: VinFast Auto Ltd Stock (VFS) Moved Up by 7.16% on Apr 6: Facts Behind the Movement
feed.summary: VinFast Auto Ltd (VFS) stock rose by 7.16% on April 6th, driven by strong financial performance in Q4 2025, record EV deliveries, and ambitious targets for 2026 including 300,000 EV deliveries and international expansion. Despite some analyst caution, record dealer orders for electric scooters in Vietnam also contributed to positive market sentiment. Technical and fundamental analysis presented in the article offer further insights into the company's current position and future prospects.

feed.title: Vontier Earns Seven British Safety Council Awards
feed.summary: Vontier Corporation has received seven International Safety Awards from the British Safety Council for its global commitment to workplace health and safety. These awards highlight Vontier's dedication to high standards for employee protection and risk mitigation in the mobility technology sector. Mark Morelli, President and CEO, acknowledged the global team's hard work in achieving this recognition.

feed.title: ZLAB (NASDAQ: ZLAB) notices proposed sale of 853 ADS; prior transfers listed
feed.summary: Zai Lab Ltd (NASDAQ: ZLAB) has filed a Form 144, notifying of a proposed sale of 853 American Depositary Shares (ADS) with a value of $17,442.57. The filing also disclosed previous transfers by Yajing Chen, including 1,703 ADS on March 13, 2026, and 5,199 ADS on April 2, 2026, totaling over $137,000. It also notes a restricted stock vesting event on April 2, 2026.

feed.title: Allegiant Air to cease base operations in Savannah
feed.summary: Allegiant Air has announced it will cease base operations at the Savannah-Hilton Head International Airport effective November 2nd, citing changes in seasonal demand patterns. Despite this, the airline confirmed it would continue to operate flights to popular destinations during peak travel periods. This decision comes months after Allegiant pilots in Savannah picketed for an updated contract, though the airline stated the closure was not related to these events.

feed.title: Trilogy Metals upgraded at Raymond James on Alaska copper project (TMQ:NYSE)
feed.summary: Trilogy Metals (TMQ) was upgraded to Outperform from Market Perform by Raymond James, with a C$8 price target. The upgrade is attributed to the company's copper exposure through the Arctic project in Alaska, which has the support of the Alaskan government and NANA. Trilogy Metals' stock was up 2.4% in Monday's trading following the news.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson named to Fortune's 2026 America's Most Innovative Companies list; The company's dedication to advancing solutions for the world's most pressing health challenges has once again earned it a place on this annual ranking.
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson has been recognized on Fortune's 2026 America's Most Innovative Companies list, marking its presence on the list since its inception in 2023. The company's consistent dedication to innovation in healthcare, spanning from product development to fostering an innovative culture, is highlighted as the core reason for this achievement. J&J's commitment aligns with its mission statement, "Our Credo," emphasizing experimentation and the development of innovative programs across various health challenges.

feed.title: TER $313.76 (Teradyne, NASDAQ) 06 Apr 2026: AI demand lifts robotics test outlook
feed.summary: Teradyne, Inc. (TER) is trading at $313.76, driven by AI demand in its semiconductor test and industrial automation segments. Analysts and Meyka AI generally have a constructive view on the stock, though valuation concerns are noted due to its high P/E ratio and other metrics. Investors are advised to monitor its upcoming earnings report on April 29, 2026, and AI-related equipment orders.

feed.title: Gary Farmer: Tesla should get its incentives from Travis County
feed.summary: Gary Farmer, founder of Opportunity Austin, advocates for Travis County to provide incentives to Tesla. He emphasizes that the county should "keep its word" regarding financial support for the company. A critical meeting on this issue is scheduled for April 7.

feed.title: Mettler-Toledo (MTD) Analyst Rating Update: Evercore ISI Group Lowers Price Target | MTD Stock News
feed.summary: Evercore ISI Group has reiterated its "Outperform" rating for Mettler-Toledo (MTD) but has reduced the price target to $1,425 from $1,515. This adjustment reflects an ongoing assessment of the company's market performance and future potential. Other analysts have also adjusted their ratings and price targets for Mettler-Toledo in recent months, with the average target price across 14 analysts being $1,516.94, implying a 20.12% upside from its current price.

feed.title: Vale Base Metals bets on Sudbury and existing mines to drive copper output
feed.summary: Vale Base Metals plans to double its annual copper production to 700,000 tons by 2035, relying heavily on its existing mines and projects, especially in Sudbury. The company aims to achieve this through efficiencies, cost-cutting, and maximizing current assets rather than acquisitions. A significant part of this strategy includes a potential joint venture with Glencore in Sudbury, projected to yield substantial copper output over 20 years.

feed.title: Real Estate Roundup: March update
feed.summary: This article provides a March update on significant retail real estate developments, including tenant changes, property acquisitions, and new projects. Key announcements include the arrival of live entertainment at Pacific City, the retirement of Tanger Inc.'s chair Steven B. Tanger, and major redevelopments for MainPlace Mall and Grand Central Mall. Other notable news features Costco's first standalone gas station, the passing of Simon Property Group CEO David Simon, the listing of Trumbull Mall for sale, and the upcoming Lionel Messi-themed experience at American Dream.

feed.title: Texas Instruments (TXN) SVP lists common stock and option holdings
feed.summary: Texas Instruments SVP Abraham Tsedeniya has filed an initial statement detailing his holdings of Texas Instruments common stock and non-qualified stock options. He directly owns 21,562 common shares, including those from restricted stock units, and holds options with exercise prices from $79.26 to $218.97, expiring between 2027 and 2036. These option grants generally become exercisable in four annual installments.

feed.title: Citigroup (NYSE:C) Price Target Raised to $137.00
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has raised its price target for Citigroup (NYSE:C) to $137.00, maintaining a "buy" rating and implying a 17.5% upside. This positive outlook is echoed by several other analysts, contributing to a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an average price target of $127.59. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings of $1.81 per share, surpassing estimates, and declared a cash dividend of $0.60 per share, reinforcing investor confidence.

feed.title: Merck & Co., Inc. (NYSE:MRK) Stock Price Expected to Rise, JPMorgan Chase & Co. Analyst Says
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has raised its price target for Merck & Co., Inc. (NYSE:MRK) to $135 from $125, maintaining an "overweight" rating and suggesting an 11.8% upside. This follows Merck's strong Q4 2025 earnings beat, with EPS of $2.04 and revenue of $16.40 billion, surpassing analyst expectations. The company also provided optimistic FY2026 EPS guidance, while institutional investors have significantly increased their holdings despite some insider selling.

feed.title: Horizon Kinetics (TPL) adds to Texas Pacific Land stake
feed.summary: Horizon Kinetics Asset Management LLC, a significant owner of Texas Pacific Land Corp, made a small open-market purchase of 1 share of TPL common stock for $443.26 on April 2, 2026. This transaction increased its direct holdings to 3,461,344 shares. The filing also references a Schedule 13D amendment from March 26, 2026, which reported a beneficial ownership of 10,050,070 shares, including interests held by director Murray Stahl.

feed.title: Amgen’s Subcutaneous Tepezza Scores In TED As More Convenient Version
feed.summary: Amgen has announced positive topline results from its Phase III trial for a subcutaneous formulation of Tepezza, a drug used to treat Thyroid Eye Disease (TED). This new version is expected to offer a more convenient administration option for patients. The article highlights this development within the context of pharmaceutical business news.

feed.title: Unum Group to Release First Quarter 2026 Results and Host Conference Call
feed.summary: Unum Group (NYSE: UNM) will release its first quarter 2026 financial results on April 28, 2026, at approximately 4:15 p.m. ET. The company will also host a conference call on April 29, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. ET to discuss these results, during which senior management may provide forward-looking information. Interested parties can register for the call or access a live webcast.
